Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Quinn J. Chevalier, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Koray Sanli, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Michaelangelo Bellusci.
Default was entered against defendant July 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Koray Sanli, and against the Defaulted Defendant Michaelangelo Bellusci as follows:

Damages/Principal - $90,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $10,934.00.
Costs - $1,250.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $102,184.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Quinn J. Chevalier, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Korey Sanli.
No appearance by defendant Michaelangelo Bellusci.
Default was entered against defendant on September 22, 2009.

The Court cannot proceed with today's default prove-up hearing due to improper service of plaintiff's first amended complaint. Accordingly, by Order of the Court, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR.
